title: Taxi Brodarica | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Brodarica: pickups at the Krapanj ferry and along the waterfront, plus fixed airport transfers to Split (€95) and Zadar and runs into Šibenik.
keywords: taxi brodarica, brodarica taxi, brodarica krapanj ferry, brodarica airport transfer, brodarica to split airport, taxi brodarica sibenik

schema.name: Taxi Brodarica
schema.description: Private fixed-price taxi from Brodarica, south of Šibenik and the Krapanj ferry crossing, to Split Airport, Zadar Airport and Šibenik.

mainEntity.name: Can you drop me at the Krapanj ferry?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I take you right down to the Brodarica waterfront by the ferry landing for the Krapanj crossing, and I can collect you there on the way back too.

mainEntity.name: Do you serve the whole Brodarica waterfront?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, along the seafront and the streets behind it. Send your address or accommodation name and I will confirm the exact meeting point.

mainEntity.name: Is the airport transfer a fixed price?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Split Airport is €95 and Zadar Airport €135 per car for up to 4 passengers, tolls and luggage included.
